verses.text: Speak 'the things which become sound doctrine'; aged men sober, aged women holy. Sound living. Doctrine bears fruit in godly conduct.
Speak 'the things which become sound doctrine'; aged men sober, aged women holy. Sound living. Doctrine bears fruit in godly conduct.
Speak 'the things which become sound doctrine'; aged men sober, aged women holy. Sound living. Doctrine bears fruit in godly conduct.
Teach the young women to love their husbands and children, 'keepers at home,' good. Home graces. The gospel beautifies family life.
Teach the young women to love their husbands and children, 'keepers at home,' good. Home graces. The gospel beautifies family life.
Exhort young men to be soberminded; 'shewing thyself a pattern of good works.' Be an example. The teacher must model what he teaches.
Exhort young men to be soberminded; 'shewing thyself a pattern of good works.' Be an example. The teacher must model what he teaches.
Exhort young men to be soberminded; 'shewing thyself a pattern of good works.' Be an example. The teacher must model what he teaches.
Exhort servants to be obedient, that they 'adorn the doctrine of God our Saviour.' Adorned gospel. Faithful service makes the truth attractive.
Exhort servants to be obedient, that they 'adorn the doctrine of God our Saviour.' Adorned gospel. Faithful service makes the truth attractive.
'The grace of God that bringeth salvation hath appeared to all men,' teaching us to live soberly and godly. Teaching grace. Grace saves and trains us to holiness.
'The grace of God that bringeth salvation hath appeared to all men,' teaching us to live soberly and godly. Teaching grace. Grace saves and trains us to holiness.
Looking for 'that blessed hope, and the glorious appearing of... Jesus Christ,' who gave Himself to redeem us. Blessed hope. We await His coming, who bought us for His own.
